summary: Frontend testing for SIGESC attendance UI refactoring - Anos Finais (6º-9º) now uses 'Nº de Aulas' dropdown (1-6) with multiple columns instead of session tabs. All 12 test cases passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created attendance data for 6º ANO A, MATEMÁTICA, date 03/04/2026 with 3 aulas
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance UI for Anos Finais (6º-9º) now uses dropdown 'Nº de Aulas' (1-6) with multiple columns (1ª AULA, 2ª AULA, etc.). Anos Iniciais continues with single 'Frequência' column. Test data exists for 6º ANO A, MATEMÁTICA: 01/04/2026 (2 aulas), 03/04/2026 (3 aulas).

test_results.test_1_login_and_navigate: PASSED - Login as admin and navigate to /admin/attendance
test_results.test_2_select_6ano_matematica: PASSED - Selected escola, turma 6º ANO A, componente MATEMÁTICA, date 01/04/2026
test_results.test_3_verify_num_aulas_dropdown: PASSED - Dropdown 'Nº de Aulas' appears with value '2' (existing data has 2 sessions)
test_results.test_4_verify_table_columns: PASSED - Table has columns 'Aluno', '1ª Aula', '2ª Aula' with P/F/J buttons
test_results.test_5_verify_loaded_status: PASSED - Status loaded correctly: ANA=P/F, JOAO=F/P, MARIA=P/J (1ªAula/2ªAula)
test_results.test_6_change_to_3_aulas: PASSED - Changed to 3 aulas, '3ª AULA' column appeared
test_results.test_7_click_pfj_3rd_column: PASSED - Clicked P in 3rd column for first student, button selected (green)
test_results.test_8_todos_presentes: PASSED - 'Todos Presentes' marked all 9 P buttons (3 students × 3 aulas)
test_results.test_9_todos_ausentes: PASSED - 'Todos Ausentes' marked all 9 F buttons (3 students × 3 aulas)
test_results.test_10_anos_iniciais_no_dropdown: PASSED - TURMA MULTI 1-2-3 (Anos Iniciais) has NO 'Nº de Aulas' dropdown
test_results.test_11_anos_iniciais_single_column: PASSED - Anos Iniciais has single 'Frequência' column, summary shows 'dias' not 'aulas'
test_results.test_12_save_and_persistence: PASSED - Saved 3 aulas for 03/04/2026, reloaded and data persisted correctly (3 P, 3 F, 3 J)

features_verified.multiple_columns: Table shows '1ª Aula', '2ª Aula', '3ª Aula' etc. based on selection
features_verified.pfj_buttons_per_column: Each column has separate P/F/J buttons per student
features_verified.todos_presentes_all_columns: Marks P for ALL columns, not just one
features_verified.todos_ausentes_all_columns: Marks F for ALL columns, not just one
features_verified.anos_iniciais_behavior: No dropdown, single 'Frequência' column, summary shows 'dias'
features_verified.anos_finais_behavior: Dropdown visible, multiple columns, summary shows 'aulas'
features_verified.save_per_aula: Each aula saved as independent record with aula_numero
features_verified.summary_display: Shows 'Previstas X aulas' for Anos Finais, 'Previstos X dias' for Anos Iniciais
